summary: File download token replay enables unauthorized file access
expected_security_impact: Unauthorized file download via replay of token obtained from another user
actual_observed_result: PoC bundle created but not executed
verification_method: User A uploads file and gets token, User B uses same token to download file
evidence_produced_by_run: User A obtains file download token
User B accesses file using same token
limitations_or_blockers: Requires TYPO3 instance with file uploads
Token must be shared or leaked
